English let's imagine you just helped a

saying a few of these
phrases it was no problem not a problem
or no problem all of these would
communicate the same thing as saying
you're welcome but in addition they're
letting your friend know that it wasn't
that big of a deal for you to take time
from your day to help them move
let's imagine you just helped a friend

it was my pleasure or my

you could
